Summarize a Gazepoint audit trail

Source: R/audit-trail-summary.R
summarize_gazepoint_audit_trail.Rd

Summarizes pass, warning, failure, not-checked, recorded, and other status counts from a Gazepoint audit index. The summary is descriptive only and is intended to support transparent reporting of audit outputs.

Usage

summarize_gazepoint_audit_trail(audit_index, by = NULL)

Arguments

audit_index

A gazepoint_audit_index object, a data frame, or an object accepted by create_gazepoint_audit_index().

by

Optional character vector of grouping columns in audit_index, such as "audit_id", "source_table", or "domain".

Value

A data frame with class gazepoint_audit_trail_summary.
